name: Leading Edge Golf
about: Leading Edge Golf is Mid-Michigan's premier golf shop that also operates as an indoor golf venue and custom club fitting center. The venue offers both a retail component for purchasing golf equipment and a comprehensive indoor golf simulation experience. Customers can book tee times for the simulator or schedule club fitting sessions with professionals. The service is designed for both serious golfers and casual players, providing a convenient all-in-one location for practice, fitting, and equipment needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Premier golf shop with access to quality equipment and gear
Custom club fitting services for personalized equipment optimization
Indoor simulation capabilities for year-round practice and play
Convenient all-in-one location for shopping, fitting, and playing

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs for the simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify any food or drink policies, so it's best to contact them directly for details.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required for a full 18-hole round, so this information would need to be obtained directly from the venue.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly mention child-friendly features or policies, so it's recommended to contact them directly to inquire about family accommodations.
